title: pelargonium × hibiscinum
intro: Pelargonium × hibiscinum, also known as the Cape Rose Geranium or Rosy Geranium, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as colds and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × hibiscinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
